overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along a high elevated bridge structure toward a large gargoyle statue at night. The camera then pans around to reveal a full moon and the illuminated Gotham City skyline in the background under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with gothic statue monument

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the narrow bridge walkway toward the large gargoyle statue ahead

entered.detail: large stone gargoyle figure with horns and wings set within an archway
gothic stone arch framing the gargoyle statue
illuminated city skyline with numerous buildings and towers visible in the distance
narrow elevated walkway with metal grating surface
red safety railings along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a narrow elevated bridge walkway toward an imposing gargoyle statue framed by a stone archway. The Gotham City skyline glows in the distance to the right under dark stormy skies, with red safety railings lining both sides of the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: camera begins panning left around Batman, transitioning from following to orbital view

agents.ego_description: Batman stands still as the camera orbits around him, revealing the dramatic night sky and city view behind him

entered.detail: large bright full moon partially obscured by clouds
dark turbulent clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left around Batman, revealing a dramatic view of the full moon and storm clouds behind him. The Gotham skyline shifts from the right to the left of the frame as the gargoyle statue passes out of view, showcasing the vast urban landscape under the luminous moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused approach toward a gothic monument and expands into a sweeping panoramic view of a storm-swept city. It begins with Batman walking along a narrow elevated bridge walkway, flanked by red safety railings and heading toward an imposing gargoyle statue framed by a stone archway. As he advances, the glowing Gotham City skyline remains visible to the right under dark, stormy skies. The camera then pans left around the character, causing the gargoyle to pass out of view while shifting the urban landscape across the frame. This movement finally reveals a dramatic vista of a luminous full moon piercing through heavy storm clouds, casting a cold light over the vast city below.
